maps.description: List of multiplayer maps that can be processed by grid2scene.

id.description: Short stable identifier for the map (e.g., beachdead, alienbasehub, thebloodcount).

name.description: Human-friendly display name for the map.

n64_ancestor.description: Optional reference to original N64 map (e.g., Beach, TotalWar, Raptor).

grid_path.description: Path to the grid JSON file (map_grid_v1) relative to repo root.

entities_path.description: Path to the entities JSON file (map_entities_v1) relative to repo root.

tileset_paths.description: Engine-specific tileset mapping files that grid2scene uses for asset resolution.

unreal.description: Path to Unreal tileset JSON for this map.

unity.description: Path to Unity tileset JSON for this map.

godot.description: Path to Godot tileset JSON for this map.

supported_modes.description: List of supported game mode identifiers for this map.

notes.description: Optional notes about this map (status, TODOs, etc.).
